quoteLast: ,' said he, 'and I've a meeting at my house at half-past: so, unless you complete that instrument _now_, I regret to say I must take it back unfinished, and the result may be to defeat the arrangement altogether, and if the consequences should prove serious, I, at least, am not to blame.'
title: Wylder's Hand
author: Le Fanu, Joseph Sheridan, 1814-1873

quoteLast: , and sets on the first day of the new year at 5:47 a.
title: The Chautauquan, Vol. 05, December 1884, No. 3
author: Chautauqua Literary and Scientific Circle; Chautauqua Institution; Flood, Theodore L., 1842- [Editor]
